response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and excellent communication abilities, they critically lack the mandatory technical requirements for this role. They have only approximately 6 months of C++ experience from 2014-2015, far below the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. Additionally, they have zero domain expertise in financial services, fixed income, or capital markets—one of which is required. Their current work focuses on full-stack web/Node.js development, not systems-level programming. The gap between requirements and background is too significant to bridge in this consulting engagement context.
strengths: Demonstrated excellent communication skills through workshops, training courses, and public speaking engagements
Solid software engineering fundamentals with experience across multiple languages and platforms
Relevant CI/CD pipeline and DevOps knowledge from setting up GitLab, CI servers, and Docker infrastructure
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience from 2014-2015, a decade ago, falling far short of the required 5-10 years
Complete absence of financial services, fixed income, or capital markets domain knowledge—a mandatory requirement
Current role and recent career focus on full-stack web development and TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level programming
